Motion To Compel Defendant Wonolo, Inc.S Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Request For Sanctions; And Declaration Of Zaneta Conroy [Discovery]
Off Calendar Mar-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ronald Poirier, Esq. of the Law Office of Christian B. Green for Defendant Wanolo through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant's Counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem hearing the matter. The Court indicates it did not receive any email contesting the tentative rulings. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARIA GUADALUPE RODRIGUEZ's Motion To Compel Defendant Wonolo, Inc.'s Responses To Request For Production Of Documents. Request For Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. All objections are waived. CCP 2031.300. Complete responses due no later than March 20, 2020. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $780 (2 hours at $360 plus $60 filing fee), payable by March 20, 2020.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling approved as to form directly to the Judge Pro Tem at sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
